user.description: Select your Fluval aquarium LED light. Ensure the light is on and in range. Found {count} device(s).

manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Fluval light (e.g. {mac_example}). You can find it in your phone's Bluetooth settings or the Fluval app.

confirm.description: Do you want to set up **{name}**?

error.invalid_format: Invalid MAC address format. Use AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.

data_description.ping_interval: How often Home Assistant reads from the light to keep the BLE connection alive. Lower values improve reliability at the cost of slightly more radio traffic. Default: 10 s.
data_description.active_time: How long to maintain the BLE connection after the last command. Reducing this saves Bluetooth adapter bandwidth when the light is idle. Default: 120 s.
